title: 8 Signs a Man Is Learning to Lead the Way Jesus Did
caption:
Most men are confusing leadership with control.

Jesus modeled something different: apology first, service first, hard truth first. The towel before the crown. Going first into the cost, not just into the credit.

The man who leads like Jesus did is the one who's under authority somewhere, who protects the powerless, who's the same man at 10 PM as he is on Sunday. Who governs his own heart before he tries to govern anyone else.

That's the standard. Not "be in charge." Go first.

Save this for the man who's learning how to lead without performing it.

#faith #christianmen #leadership #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #jesus #discipleship
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
